description_for_human: Near real-time intelligence on f(x) Protocol trading performance, including fxUSD borrow rates, top PNL wallets, and premium leaderboard analytics.
description_for_model: Provides f(x) Protocol DeFi trading data. Use getFxusdRate to check current fxUSD borrow APR before leveraged positions. Use getTopPnl to find the highest-performing wallets for copy-trading analysis. Use getRates for cross-protocol lending rate comparisons (Aave, CrvUSD, fxUSD). Premium endpoints require x402 USDC payment.
